repo.description: An emacs package for creating images from source code buffers using silicon

terms.context_snippet: A convenience package for creating images of the current source buffer using Silicon <https://github.com/Aloxaf/silicon>. It requires you to have the `silicon` command-line tool installed and preferably on your path. You can specify the path to the executable by setting `silicon…
